zh.Sefton, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Molyneux於大約1397年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓時，他的父親Richard Molyneux30歲，母親Ellen DeUrswick34歲。他於大約1420年與Margaret L'Estrange在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世在英國英格蘭藍卡爾。

zh-hans.Sefton, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾澤福頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Molyneux于大约1397年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾澤福頓时，他的父亲Richard Molyneux30岁，母亲Ellen DeUrswick34岁。他于大约1420年与Margaret L'Estrange在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世在英国英格兰藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Molyneux was born about 1397, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Molyneux, was 30 and his mother, Ellen DeUrswick, was 34. He married Margaret L'Estrange about 1420, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Molyneux est né environ 1397, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Molyneux, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ellen DeUrswick, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Margaret L'Estrange environ 1420, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Molyneux um 1397 in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Molyneux 30 und seine Mutter Ellen DeUrswick 34. Er hat um 1420 in Lancashire, England Margaret L'Estrange geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Molyneux è nato il circa 1397 nel Sefton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Molyneux, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Ellen DeUrswick, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Margaret L'Estrange circa 1420, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Molyneuxが約1397年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで生まれた時，父Richard Molyneuxは30歳，母Ellen DeUrswickは34歳であった。約1420年にイギリスランカシュアイアでMargaret L'Estrangeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Molyneux(이)가 대략 1397년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Molyneux(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen DeUrswick(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1420년 영국 랭카실르에서 Margaret L'Estrange(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Molyneux nasceu aproximadamente 1397, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Molyneux, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ellen DeUrswick, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret L'Estrange aproximadamente 1420, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Molyneux родился около 1397 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Molyneux было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen DeUrswick, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret L'Estrange около 1420 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Molyneux nació aproximadamente 1397, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Molyneux, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ellen DeUrswick, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Margaret L'Estrange aproximadamente 1420, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
